items.statement: MUST NOT use protected attributes (race, gender, age, national origin) or their proxies (zip code, name) in the loan decision or rate
MUST NOT store raw PII / financial secrets (SSN, full account or card numbers) in plaintext in the audit log
MUST NOT mislead or omit the true rate/APR/terms in the explanation; an adverse decision must state the real principal reason (adverse-action)
